info.description: REST API for the Content Control Center application.
info.title: Content Control Center API

get.description: Returns all campaigns ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new campaign. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns all posts for the given campaign ID, with campaign, platform, and pieces hydrated.
Returns a single campaign by Sqid.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing campaign.

get.description: Returns all content bank pieces ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new content bank piece. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns a single content bank piece by Sqid.

put.description: Updates title and content of an existing piece.

delete.description: Deletes a content bank piece by Sqid.

get.description: Returns the health status of the service and database connectivity.

post.description: Uploads an image file to object storage and returns its public URL.

get.description: Returns all platforms ordered by creation date.
Returns a single platform by Sqid.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing platform.

get.description: Returns all posts ordered by creation date, with campaign, platform, and pieces hydrated.

post.description: Creates a new post. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns a single post by Sqid with campaign, platform, and pieces hydrated.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing post.

post.description: Authenticates a user by email and password, sets a session cookie, and returns the created session.

delete.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the session cookie.

get.description: Returns a single setting by key. Authentication is not required when setup_complete is false, allowing the frontend to check setup status before any user exists.

put.description: Creates or updates a setting by key.

get.description: Returns all tags ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new tag. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns a single tag by Sqid.

put.description: Updates name and color of an existing tag.

get.description: Returns all users ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new user. Open (no auth required) while setup_complete=false; requires authentication once setup is complete.

get.description: Returns a single user by Sqid.

put.description: Updates name and/or email of an existing user.

password.description: Password is optional on update; when provided it must be at least 8 characters.

campaign.description: Hydrated relations — not stored in the database.
